b:T9920,<div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>growth hormone/drug no longer present «in blood» <em>OWTTE</em><br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>lack of hormones reduce «gained» muscle mass/strength ✔ </p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
<p><em>Award [1 mark] for each complete row, up to [3 max].</em><br/><em>Apply ECF the second time <span style="text-decoration: underline;">plasma</span> is omitted and award the mark.</em></p>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>a. endocrine gland ✔</p>
<p>b. «ductless gland that» secretes hormones directly into the bloodstream ✔</p>
<div class="question_part_label">c.</div>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/biology/topic/d/","children":["← back to ","Biology"," topic ","d"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"19N.3.HL.TZ0.22"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"Biology"}],null,["$","span",null,{"children":"HL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","3"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"19N"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","d-5-hormones-and-metabolism"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;\">\n<p>Athletes taking growth hormones show an increase in their sprinting capacity. This is not maintained after discontinuing the drug. Suggest <strong>one</strong> reason for the disappearance of the effect.</p>\n<div class=\"marks\">[1]</div>\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">a.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;\">\n<p>Distinguish between the mode of action of steroid hormones and peptide hormones.</p>\n<div class=\"marks\">[3]</div>\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">b.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;\">\n<p>Identify with reasons whether the pituitary gland is an exocrine or endocrine gland.</p>\n<div class=\"marks\">[2]</div>\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">c.</div>\n</div>"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$b"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">a.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">b.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">c.</div>\n</div>"}}]]}]]}]
